description: Few-shot examples for nl_to_tio.py. Learn official prefixes, stable TIO graph structure, explicit Expectation-to-Target binding, decomposition of multiple requirements, and when to introduce Context, Condition, or icm:valuesOfTargetProperty. Use an ex: prefix for instance resources so the output stays compact and readable. Use comments only as supplemental text, not as the only carrier of core intent semantics. Do not invent unofficial predicates such as icm:hasValue, icm:hasProperty, icm:condition, or icm:expectation.

examples.nl_intent: 在高雄與屏東之間提供企業專用 5G 切片服務。
確保視訊會議流量的延遲低於 20ms。
保證企業備援連線的下載速度高於 200Mbps 且延遲低於 15ms。
在週末晚間時段，將園區備份流量限制在 300Mbps 以下。
如果回程延遲超過 15ms，則降低背景同步流量的優先權。
在遠端維運期間，確保控制信號延遲低於 5ms，並維持監控影像串流不中斷。
